entities.woman: a woman standing at a fork in the path
entities.signpost: a wooden signpost with two arrows

scenes.title: The Crossroads
scenes.background_prompt: A countryside path that splits into two directions at a fork, with a wooden signpost, wild grass on both sides, a stone wall, and rolling hills. Misty morning. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A countryside path on a misty morning. The path reaches a fork and splits into two directions. A wooden signpost stands at the junction with two arrow-shaped signs pointing in opposite directions — one reads 'VILLAGE 2km' and the other reads 'FOREST TRAIL'. A woman of about thirty in a tan hiking jacket, dark leggings, and walking boots stands at the fork, facing the signpost. She has stopped mid-stride, one hand resting on her chin, head tilted slightly, clearly weighing her options. Her expression is contemplative — not lost, but genuinely uncertain about which path to choose. Wild grass and purple wildflowers grow on both sides of the path. A low stone wall runs along the left path, and the right path curves into a dark line of trees. Mist hangs low over the rolling hills beyond.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place woman at the fork in the path, standing and facing the signpost, one hand on chin, head tilted, expression contemplative. Stopped mid-stride.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground, a dense patch of green grass is dotted with small yellow, purple, and white wildflowers. A dirt path begins here and splits into two directions. At the center of this fork stands a wooden signpost with two weathered arrows pointing left and right. To the right of the signpost, a woman stands in a contemplative pose with her right hand to her chin, looking toward the signpost. She has long, wavy brown hair tied with a small blue ribbon and is wearing a mustard-yellow sweater, a rust-colored skirt, brown leggings, and olive-green hiking boots. A brown backpack is strapped to her shoulders. To her right, a low wall made of stacked grey and brown stones, some covered in green moss, runs along the edge of the path. In the midground, the left path winds through a lush green meadow toward a cluster of tall, leafy green trees. The right path curves through rolling hills toward a distant valley. The background features more rolling green hills under a soft blue sky filled with large, fluffy white clouds. On the far right, a group of dark green coniferous trees stands on a hillside, and the sky glows with a warm, pale light from the sun, suggesting early morning or late afternoon.

CH: woman with long wavy brown hair
S: rolling green hills under fluffy clouds
sunny day in a lush meadow
early morning light over the valley
IE: reaching a fork in the dirt path
IR: feeling unsure about which way to go
wondering which path is the right one

planning her route through the hills
A: standing with her hand on her chin
looking thoughtfully at the wooden signpost
CO: pausing her hike to check the signs
stopping at the crossroads in the meadow

ENP: weathered wooden signpost with two arrows
low wall made of mossy grey stones
SC: because the path splits in two directions
